---
slug: "research"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    html-math-method: katex
css: styles-dark.css
lightbox: true
---

:::: {#body style="width: 90%; margin: auto; font-weight: normal; text-align: left"}
### **#il[uv]{.underline}bugs photo gallery**

\

```{=html}
<div class="kinopio-embed" style="height: 420px; width: 100%;">
  <iframe src="https://kinopio.club/embed/?spaceId=XFxt5q4xmVkOqK65KMfl4&zoom=100" style="height: 100%; width: 100%; border: 0; border-radius: 6px;">
  </iframe>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <button id="uv-toggle-btn" onclick="toggleUVFlashlight()" style="
    background: #3c0090;
    color: #d4aaff;
    border: 2px solid #7a30d0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  ">⋆✴︎ Toggle UV flashlight</button>
</div>

<script>
function toggleUVFlashlight() {
  if (window.__uvFlashlight) {
    window.__uvFlashlight.remove();
    delete window.__uvFlashlight;
    // remove iframe blockers
    document.querySelectorAll('.__uv-iframe-block').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.getElementById('uv-toggle-btn').textContent = '⋆✴︎ Toggle UV flashlight';
    return;
  }

  const RADIUS = 160;
  const DARKNESS = 0.92;
  const UV_TINT = "rgba(60, 0, 160, 0.18)";

  const overlay = document.createElement("div");
  Object.assign(overlay.style, {
    position:      "fixed",
    inset:         "0",
    pointerEvents: "none",
    zIndex:        "2147483647",
    transition:    "opacity 0.2s ease",
    mixBlendMode:  "normal",
  });

  let mx = window.innerWidth  / 2;
  let my = window.innerHeight / 2;

  function buildGradient(x, y) {
    return `radial-gradient(
      circle ${RADIUS}px at ${x}px ${y}px,
      transparent 0%,
      ${UV_TINT}   ${RADIUS * 0.6}px,
      rgba(0,0,0,${DARKNESS}) ${RADIUS}px
    )`;
  }

  function onMouseMove(e) {
    mx = e.clientX;
    my = e.clientY;
    overlay.style.background = buildGradient(mx, my);
  }

  overlay.style.background = buildGradient(mx, my);

  try {
    document.documentElement.appendChild(overlay);
  } catch (err) {
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  }

  document.addEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove, { passive: true });

  // cover each iframe with a transparent div so mousemove fires over them
  document.querySelectorAll('iframe').forEach(iframe => {
    const block = document.createElement('div');
    block.className = '__uv-iframe-block';
    Object.assign(block.style, {
      position: 'absolute',
      top: '0', left: '0',
      width: '100%', height: '100%',
      zIndex: '2147483646',
      background: 'transparent',
    });
    // iframe parent must be positioned for absolute to work
    const parent = iframe.parentElement;
    if (getComputedStyle(parent).position === 'static') {
      parent.style.position = 'relative';
    }
    parent.appendChild(block);
  });

  window.__uvFlashlight = overlay;
  overlay.remove = function () {
    document.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);
    (overlay.parentElement || document.documentElement).removeChild(overlay);
  };

  document.getElementById('uv-toggle-btn').textContent = '⋆✴︎ UV flashlight ON';
}
</script>
```
::::
